response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the visual: Static image of Hololive 3rd generation members (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine) with text in Japanese confirming the end of the free part of the live show. 2. Audio: Upbeat vocal pop song playing in the background. 3. Identification: Identified song title as "きゅるるん大作戦" based on the on-screen text associated with their 3rd generation live concert. 4. Search: Performed multiple searches for lyrics to "きゅるるん大作戦". No public lyrics found. 5. Conclusion: Metadata resolved, lyrics are unavailable, setting lyrics fields to null in the final JSON output.
response.global_summary: The video features a static image of Hololive 3rd generation members (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine) following their live concert, with their song "きゅるるん大作戦" playing in the background. The text on the screen indicates the end of the free portion of their live show.

scenes.description: A static image of Hololive 3rd generation members is displayed with text indicating the live show's free part has ended. The song 'きゅるるん大作戦' plays throughout the segment.
